# Raman Daksh - Portfolio

> Senior Full Stack Developer specializing in Laravel, Flutter, and cross-platform architecture. Building scalable backend systems and beautiful mobile apps.

## Sections

- Hero: Personal introduction and role
- Projects: Selected work and open source projects
- Experience: Professional work history
- About: Personal background, stats, and tech stack
- Testimonials: Client and colleague recommendations
- Blog: Technical writing and tutorials
- Skills: Technology expertise showcase (marquee)
- GitHub: Open source repositories
- Contact: Email and social links

## Key Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/dakshraman
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/dakshraman
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/dakshraman
- Telegram: https://t.me/dakshraman
- Resume: https://dakshraman.in/resume.pdf

## Tech Stack

Laravel, Flutter, React.js, Python, Dart, PHP, Firebase, Java, C++, SQL, Linux, Shopify, WordPress

## About

Raman Daksh is a Software Engineer from Dehradun, India with expertise in full-stack development, system architecture, and cross-platform applications. Passionate about building scalable solutions and contributing to open source.
